sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: 몬스터 베버리지, 2026년 1분기 매출 23억 5,000만 달러로 전년 대비 26.9% 성장

keyPoints.text: 2026년 1분기 순매출은 23억 5,000만 달러를 기록하며 전년 동기 대비 26.9% 증가했습니다.
영업이익은 7억 3,000만 달러로 전년 대비 28.1% 증가하며 견조한 수익성을 보였습니다.

businessChanges.text: 몬스터 에너지 음료 부문 매출이 21억 9,000만 달러로 27.6% 성장하며 전체 실적을 견인했습니다.
전략 브랜드(Strategic Brands) 부문 매출은 1억 2,670만 달러로 전년 대비 28.9% 증가했습니다.

financialHighlights.text: 순매출은 23억 5,000만 달러로, 환율 변동의 긍정적 영향 8,930만 달러가 포함되었습니다.
몬스터 에너지 음료 부문은 환율 조정 기준(non-GAAP)으로 22.8%의 매출 성장률을 기록했습니다.

watchItems.text: 환율 변동이 매출에 미치는 영향이 지속될지 여부와 향후 분기별 환율 조정 기준 성장세 확인이 필요합니다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: EX-99.1 2 tm2613885d1_ex99-1.htm EXHIBIT 99.1 Exhibit 99.1 Investor Relations Strategic Public Relations PondelWilkinson Inc. 2945 Townsgate Road, Suite 200 Westlake Village, CA 91361 T (310) 279 5980 W www.pondel.com CONTACTS: NEWS RELEASE Mark Astrachan SVP, Investor Relations & Corporate Development (951) 739-6200 Roger S. Pondel / Judy Lin PondelWilkinson Inc. (310) 279-5980 MONSTER BEVERAGE REPORTS 2026 FIRST QUARTER FINANCIAL RESULTS 2026 First Quarter Highlights · Net Sales rise 26.9 percent to $2.35 billion · Operating Income increases 28.1 percent to $730.0 million (24.1 percent to $733.5 million o  Normalized numeric aliases: $2.35 billion = 23억 5,000만 달러; $730.0 million = 7억 3,000만 달러; $733.5 million = 7억 3,350만 달러; $569.5 million = 5억 6,950만 달러; $572.4 million = 5억 7,240만 달러; $2.35 = 2.35달러; $730.0 = 730.0달러; $733.5 = 733.5달러; $572.4 = 572.4달러; 28.6 percent = 28.6%; 28.1 percent = 28.1%; 24.1 percent = 24.1%; 24.6 percent = 24.6%; 27.6 percent = 27.6%; 23.7 percent = 23.7%.

he tables at the end of this press release provide a reconciliation of non-GAAP financial measures to the Company’s results, as reported under GAAP. (See “Reconciliation of GAAP and Non-GAAP Information” below). Corona, CA – May 7, 2026 – Monster Beverage Corporation (NASDAQ: MNST) today reported financial results for the three-months ended March 31, 2026. Net sales for the 2026 first quarter increased 26.9 percent to $2.35 billion, from $1.85 billion in the same period last year. Net changes in foreign currency exchange rates had a favorable impact on net sales for the 2026 first quarter of $89.3 million. Net sales on a foreign currency adjusted basis (non-GAAP) increased 22.1 percent in the 2026 first quarter. Net sales, excluding the Alcohol Brands segmen  Normalized numeric aliases: $2.35 billion = 23억 5,000만 달러; $1.85 billion = 18억 5,000만 달러; $89.3 million = 8,930만 달러; $2.35 = 2.35달러; $1.85 = 1.85달러; $89.3 = 89.3달러; 26.9 percent = 26.9%; 22.1 percent = 22.1%; 27.5 percent = 27.5%.

cy adjusted basis (non-GAAP), increased 22.6 percent in the 2026 first quarter. Net sales for the Company’s Monster Energy® Drinks segment, which primarily includes the Company’s Monster Energy® drinks, Reign Total Body Fuel® high performance energy drinks, Reign Storm® total wellness energy drinks, Bang Energy® drinks and FLRT TM total wellness energy drinks, increased 27.6 percent to $2.19 billion for the 2026 first quarter, from $1.72 billion for the 2025 first quarter. Net changes in foreign currency exchange rates had a favorable impact on net sales for the Monster Energy® Drinks segment of approximately $82.0 million for the 2026 first quarter. Net sales on a foreign currency adjusted basis (non-GAAP) for the Monster Energy® Drinks segment increased 22  Normalized numeric aliases: $2.19 billion = 21억 9,000만 달러; $1.72 billion = 17억 2,000만 달러; $82.0 million = 8,200만 달러; $2.19 = 2.19달러; $1.72 = 1.72달러; $82.0 = 82.0달러; 22.6 percent = 22.6%; 27.6 percent = 27.6%; 22.8 percent = 22.8%.

, which primarily includes the various energy drink brands acquired from The Coca-Cola Company, as well as the Company’s affordable energy brands, Predator® and Fury®, increased 28.9 percent to $126.7 million for the 2026 first quarter, from $98.3 million in the 2025 first quarter. Net changes in foreign currency exchange rates had a favorable impact on net sales for the Strategic Brands segment of approximately $7.3 million for the 2026 first quarter. Net sales on a foreign currency adjusted basis (non-GAAP) for the Strategic Brands segment increased 21.4 percent in the 2026 first quarter.
